scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd packages/api && npm run dev" "cd packages/web && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../api && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/shared && npm run typecheck && cd ../api && npm run typecheck && cd ../web && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:run: npm run test:e2e:setup && npm run test:e2e; EXIT=$?; npm run test:e2e:teardown; exit $EXIT
